# Post-Market Debrief — June 18, 2026

Today was a no-trade day, which means you either didn't find setups that met your criteria or stayed on the sidelines—a discipline choice that preserved capital when opportunities weren't there. Your month-to-date drawdown sits at ₹13,918, so the priority right now is stopping leakage rather than chasing recovery trades. With zero trades executed, there's nothing to analyze in terms of execution quality or strategy performance, but that also means no new damage was done. For tomorrow, pull your trading plan and identify what specific conditions would trigger an entry: are you waiting for a particular volatility level, support bounce, or technical pattern that hasn't materialized yet? If the market isn't offering your setups, sitting tight is the right call—just make sure it's a deliberate decision, not analysis paralysis masking hesitation from the month's losses.
